title: Translational recoding by chemical modification of non-AUG start codon bases: Simulation dataset
author: Fujita, Yoshihiko
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Dataset of molecular dynamics simulations for RNA binding in ribosomal pre-initiation complex. 
NAMD version 2.13 (multi-core) was used for the simulations.
steps_raw:
Dataset of molecular dynamics simulations for RNA binding in ribosomal pre-initiation complex. 
NAMD version 2.13 (multi-core) was used for the simulations.
